title: PMWeather Ahoy!
description: Multiple new things to the already amazing Protomanly's Weather Mod!
body:
# /NOAA Command
The /noaa command gives you tons of options. You can issue warnings, watches, advisories, and mesoscale discussions through the /noaa nws eas strings. You can customize the warnings to your situation. You can customize the parameters to match the standards of what dangerous weather is happening.![PDS Tornado Warning EAS Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd331ec431bc0b25e848c6689943637fe4977752.png)
And with the /noaa spc command string, you can make custom forecasts, outlook summaries, and more will be added! ![Custom Day 1 forecast summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1ef557cdd58539922eb3f8635c08cd57ca09d7d.png)
with the /noaa nhc command string, you can issue tropical disturbances, chances for cyclone formation with 1 - 3 hours.![Tropical Distrubance showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b4816548a8144737f2b67e891b7f01825d1afd.png)
and with the /noaa skywarn command string, you can report all sorts of different things. You can report Hailstones, squalls and their estimated or observed windspeeds, a tornado and it's size and or windspeeds, and wind gusts in a local area!![Tornado reported example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f95631e1a8d1c09fd2767bc74dc7be19f7f574e.png)
# ITEMS
What I am planning, Is for there to be a book. And when opened, it gives you guidelines to EVERYTHING. how to do and list certain commands, how to use blocks or items, and just tells you what the mod adds and what they do.
# BLOCKS
I was anticipating added compressed block variants but my friend Jolly Fille (GO DOWNLOAD HIS MOD) made a mod called PM Blocks n' stuff.
# ITEMS
Lots of items are planned to be added.
# STRUCTURES
There is the doppler station which gives you a doppler radar and 4 anemometers along with a weather station (metar).
There is the NWS Office, which adds the NWS Office where it gives you a radar, weather station, radome blocks, and even just an office that you can stay in or keep as an office.
 There is also a buoy. I'm planning on redoing the entire buoy as the registry name was swapped with the nws office so now it says "pmweather_ahoy:nws_offics_buoy" and the structure itself is a bit empty.
 # MISCELLANEOUS
 Advancements and achievements are being planned and made. They will be added in the next major update.
